Items.Title: Application number C 220415 ZMQ (147-14 Northern Boulevard Rezoning) submitted by Northern 147-149 LLC, pursuant to Sections 197-c and 201 of the New York City Charter for an amendment of the Zoning Map, Section No. 10c: eliminating from within an existing R5 District a C1-2 District; changing from an R5 District to an R7X District; and establishing within the proposed R7X District a C2-3 District, Borough of Queens, Community District 7, Council District 20.
Items.ActionText: This Land Use Application was Hearing Held by Committee
